pr.title: Record: Parallel Muon + Parameter Banking — 82.14ms/step (3.1% faster than PR #315)

output.summary: Parameter banking plus Parallel Muon’s async comms and Polar Express polynomials redefine the optimizer step to speed training without changing the base model.
techniques: banked 3D parameter tensors replacing 66 separate linears
Polar Express minimax polynomial orthogonalization in BF16
Parallel Muon optimizer ordering with async reduce-scatter, local PE, and all-gather
